charter.phase_name: V1.12BR State Representation And Resonance Discovery
charter.mission: Build a richer state representation for lawful CPO observations, discover latent state structure without hard-coding low-dimensional thresholds, then map those structures back to return, drawdown, and eligibility/veto interpretations.
in_scope: state vector construction from selector, chronology, role, regime, and internal maturity layers
target mapping to return, drawdown, and veto/eligibility pockets

interpretation: V1.12BR opens because low-dimensional gate sweeps have now shown diminishing returns.
The lawful next move is to let state geometry surface candidate eligibility and veto regions before turning them back into explicit rules.
